name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, lifeless output that plagues most AI slide tools.
problem: Professionals waste hours reformatting AI-generated presentations that look templated and unconvincing. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between AI speed and design quality, letting users create visually sharp decks without manual cleanup. It targets business communicators who need credible, on-brand output fast.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with professional visual polish
Building client-facing sales presentations without a designer
Producing internal strategy decks quickly for leadership reviews
Turning reports or data into structured, designed slide narratives
